# Vendored Material Symbols (Apache 2.0)

20 outlined 24px icons from
[google/material-design-icons](https://github.com/google/material-design-icons)
(`symbols/web/<name>/materialsymbolsoutlined/<name>_24px.svg`, fetched
2026-07-18), embedded as path data in
`src/renderer/src/fx-icons.ts` for the Faz 6 semantic word effects.

Icons: bomb, local_fire_department, skull, favorite, heart_broken,
water_drop, star, flare, celebration, paid, flight_takeoff, speed, bolt,
ac_unit, dark_mode, deceased, crown, call, sports_mma, music_note.

License: Apache 2.0 (see `LICENSE` in this directory). The icons keep their
own license; they are NOT relicensed under the repository's MIT license.
Icons render with `fill=currentColor` so they take the active OKLCH theme.
